# init(fileURL:)

**Initializer**

Creates a preview reply from an existing file URL.

## Declaration

```swift
init(fileURL: URL)
```

## Parameters

- **fileURL**: The file URL with the content of the reply.

## Discussion

Use [doc://com.apple.quicklookui/documentation/QuickLookUI/QLPreviewReply/init(fileURL:)] to create a reply from an existing file URL, such as an image or PDF. The following example illustrates creating a reply from an existing URL:

```swift
guard let imageFileURL = Bundle.main.url(forResource: "yourImage", 
                                         withExtension: "jpg") else {
    return
}
let reply = QLPreviewReply(fileURL: imageFileURL)

```
title: init(fileURL:)
